title: no_moon.jar
description: This mod is a horror mod that slowly drives your world into chaos.
body:
![The Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b87b1783e187f0eacfb7b560890155186543393_0.webp)

BEFORE DOWNLOADING THIS MOD READ THIS:

This mod is a horror mod that slowly corrupts your world and slowly turns everything chaotic. The moon will slowly start to disappear and chaos will come. Entities will start spawning and this mod will have you on the edge of your seat, as they wait for the perfect time to strike.

THIS MOD IS BEST WITH THE FORGE VERSIONS OF IT!

This mod is a tribute to the Broken Script.

WARNING: If you don't want the game to crash then go to the config and turn game crashes off. This mod will destroy your world and destroy your builds. Most bad things can be toggled off in the config.

WARNING: Flashing lights & Loud noises.

If you are sensitive to flashing lights then go to the config. If you don't know how to get to the config then type in the command /help_config

It took 1 and a half months to develop and produce the first release.

# Content
- 83 random events
- 25 new entities
- 1 boss fight

Please feel free to give me feed back on anything in the mod.

THIS MOD DOES WORK IN MULTIPLAYER!

This mod does not mess with you computer at all.

THANK YOU TO THE BROKEN SCRIPT FOR EVERYTHING

Note: Playing with resource packs that change the moon my cause lag.

And as always... Have fun

RECOMMEND: Using the mods config, you can customize the mod to your liking. I'd also recommand you play this mod with the rudimentary shader

Link: https://modrinth.com/shader/rudimentary-ps1

Most of the resourse pack is https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-plus

PLAY THE BROKEN SCRIPT PLEASE!!!

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-broken-script-official (Curseforge)

https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script (Modrinth)

It's also compatible with the mod. Just make sure to turn on tbsmode so it won't be unfair

## Credits
- Mod by Wentworth
- Programmer - Wentworth
- Art by Wentworth
- Idea maker - Wentworth and Grant Bell
- Sounds - TornadicPolarity, and Wentworth
- Playtesters - TOO MANY NAMES
- Music - Agonizing Freedom, His Arrival, and More by TornadicPolarity
Resource Pack - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-plus

### Special thanks

One Last Time - https://www.youtube.com/@OneLastTimeMC
